sourceTitle: Ranking Web of Universities (webometrics.info), January 2026 edition

rawFiles.name: Webometrics Ranking January 2026.pdf
rawFiles.notes: Downloaded from the Figshare file URL exposed by article 31132501.

transforms: Reviewed Figshare article metadata and license.
Extracted the January 2026 Webometrics table from the PDF.
Matched the Damascus University row to the canonical sy-damascus-university record.
Created one global WR ranking snapshot and one Arab World regional REGIONR ranking snapshot.
reviewNotes: The PDF publishes Damascus University with REGIONR 142 and WR 3028. It reports 43 Syrian Arab Republic institutions in Webometrics overall, but the full Excel list is only available by request and was not imported.
